summary: Iteration 267: TTFD (Time to First Delight) Analytics System - All features verified working. Backend: 24/24 tests passed. Frontend: TTFD Dashboard renders all sections (targets, TTFD metrics, trends, queue, engagement), Admin Dashboard has TTFD button, StoryPreview has engagement tracking integration. Fixed missing useCallback import in StoryPreview.js.

issues: Cookie consent banner overlays content initially - minor UX issue, does not block functionality

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: GET /api/analytics/ttfd?days=30 returns TTFD metrics with avg/median/p95, targets, engagement rates, pipeline health, daily trends
VERIFIED: GET /api/analytics/queue returns queue_depth, processing count, tier_wait_times_24h with avg_ms/p95_ms for FREE/PAID/ADMIN tiers
VERIFIED: POST /api/analytics/track-event/{job_id} tracks all 6 event types (preview_played, export_started, export_completed, story_pack_downloaded, video_shared, preview_watch_duration)
VERIFIED: POST /api/analytics/track-event/{job_id} throttles duplicate events within 10-second window (returns throttled: true)
VERIFIED: POST /api/analytics/track-event/{job_id} returns 422 for invalid event types (Pydantic validation)
VERIFIED: GET /api/analytics/daily-aggregates returns pre-computed daily analytics
VERIFIED: All analytics endpoints require admin role (403 for regular users)
VERIFIED: TTFD Dashboard at /app/admin/ttfd-analytics renders with all 6 sections (Performance vs Targets, TTFD Metrics, Daily Trends, Queue Performance, User Engagement, Pipeline Health)
VERIFIED: TTFD Dashboard shows real data from pipeline job b5e7107e-7237-4e53-9257-c4fcb28b18eb (9.35s first_scene, 60.47s first_image, 79s first_voice, 79s preview)
VERIFIED: Admin Dashboard has TTFD Analytics button (data-testid='ttfd-analytics-btn') linking to /app/admin/ttfd-analytics
VERIFIED: Pipeline engine records ttfd_metrics on pipeline jobs (time_to_first_scene, time_to_first_image, time_to_first_voice, time_to_first_playable_preview, total_generation_time)
VERIFIED: StoryPreview page has trackEvent calls for preview_played (on play audio), story_pack_downloaded (on pack download), export_started (on export button click)
FIXED: Missing useCallback import in StoryPreview.js - added to React imports

FEATURE_3_TRACK_EVENT_ENDPOINT.throttling: 10-second window per user per event type

export_success_rate.note: Job failed at render stage due to missing ffmpeg

seed_data_creation: None - used existing pipeline jobs with TTFD metrics
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 267: TTFD Analytics fully verified. All 8 features tested and working. Key findings: (1) TTFD Dashboard shows real metrics from job b5e7107e with targets showing actual vs expected performance. (2) Engagement tracking endpoints work with throttling. (3) StoryPreview.js was missing useCallback import - fixed. (4) Pipeline jobs record ttfd_metrics automatically at each stage boundary. (5) Current TTFD metrics exceed targets (scene: 9.35s vs 5s target, image: 60.47s vs 20s target, preview: 79s vs 60s target) - these are informational metrics for performance monitoring, not bugs.
